overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in dark robes walking along a historic stone viaduct beside railway tracks at dusk. The character passes NPCs leaning on the wall and stops to view a large Gothic castle across a misty lake before continuing along the path.

events.description: passing two NPCs leaning against the right wall
slight right turn as path begins to curve toward open vista

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path beside railway tracks, passing NPCs

notable_agents.action: two figures leaning on the stone wall, looking out at the view

entered.detail: tall stone parapet wall with moss and weathering running along the right side
metal railway tracks running parallel to the walkway on the left
steep rocky cliff with sparse vegetation rising beside the tracks
irregular weathered stone cobblestones forming the walkway surface
jagged mountain peaks silhouetted against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an enclosed stone viaduct pathway flanked by a railway on the left and a high stone wall on the right. Two NPCs lean against the wall looking out at the view. The path is paved with cobblestones and the rocky cliff face rises steeply on the left, with distant mountains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: viaduct approach with panoramic lake and mountain views

events.description: passing a solitary NPC leaning on the right wall
path opens to reveal misty lake and mountain range on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the viaduct as the landscape opens up to reveal water and mountains

notable_agents.action: single figure leaning on wall looking out at the lake

entered.detail: calm body of water visible through mist in the valley below the viaduct

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the enclosed viaduct opens up to reveal expansive views of a misty lake and mountain range on the right. The stone wall continues alongside the path, and another NPC stands leaning against it, gazing out at the scenic vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: viaduct viewpoint overlooking castle and lake

events.description: path curves to reveal large Gothic castle across the lake
character stops walking to observe the castle
character resumes walking, castle and lake move out of view behind the wall

agents.ego_description: pausing to take in the view of the castle before continuing along the viaduct

entered.detail: large Gothic-style castle with multiple spires and towers situated on the far shore of the lake

segments.scene_description: The path curves to reveal a breathtaking view of a large Gothic castle across the misty lake. The character stops momentarily to observe the castle against the sunset sky before continuing along the viaduct. As the character walks on, the castle and lake disappear from view behind the stone wall, returning to the enclosed pathway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stone viaduct that transitions from a confined pathway into a sweeping panoramic vista before closing back in. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path flanked by a railway and a high stone wall, passing NPCs who lean against the masonry. As the character advances, the enclosed viaduct opens up to reveal an expansive view of a misty lake and a distant mountain range. The path then curves to unveil a large Gothic castle set against a sunset sky, where the character pauses momentarily to observe the horizon. Finally, the camera continues forward as the castle and lake disappear behind the stone wall, returning the scene to the enclosed atmosphere of the viaduct.
